creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text: Hey guys, may i ask, whats going to happen to OpenSSL in the base for FreeBSD 12.4 and 13.2? Both of these are supported for longer than OpenSSL 1.1.1 is supported and i guess, FreeBSD won't backport OpenSSL 3.0.0 to these RELENG-Releases? What are the plans about compatibility and mostly security?
